steps.title: Identify fixed and monthly costs
steps.content: The activation cost is paid one time, so it is the fixed part of the total. The monthly cost is $18$ dollars for each of $t$ months, so the monthly part is $18t$.

steps.title: Build the total cost
steps.content:
Add the fixed activation cost to the monthly cost.
$$c=18t+40$$
Choice D swaps the one-time fee and monthly rate, while choices A and B divide by a cost. The answer is C.
